task_description: Generate a changelog for version 2.1.0 of a web application framework from the provided commit history.

commits.message: feat: add WebSocket support with automatic reconnection
commits.author: elena

commits.message: feat: add built-in rate limiting middleware
commits.author: frank

commits.message: fix: resolve race condition in connection pool under high load
commits.author: grace

commits.message: fix: correct Content-Type header for multipart responses
commits.author: elena

commits.message: changed: improve request parsing performance by 40%
commits.author: frank

commits.message: fix: handle graceful shutdown when active connections exceed timeout
commits.author: grace

commits.message: security: update TLS defaults to TLS 1.3 minimum
commits.author: hank

commits.message: feat: add response compression with Brotli support
commits.author: elena

commits.message: deprecate: mark sync handler API in favor of async handlers
commits.author: frank
